title: Thomas Tuchel claims Fifa rule puts England at ‘huge’ disadvantage in Mexico City altitude
description: Thomas Tuchel lamented a Fifa rule that has shut down one possible acclimatisation plan for the last-16 tie against co-hosts
content:
Thomas Tuchel says England will be at a “huge” disadvantage in the high altitude of Mexico City on Sunday when they face Mexico in the last 16 of the World Cup as he lamented a Fifa rule that has shut down one possible acclimatisation plan.

title: Infrastructure cuts to pay for defence will cost UK 10,000 jobs, analysis shows
description: Exclusive: Findings cast doubt on Starmer claims that reallocation of funds to MoD will boost British jobs
content:
Keir Starmer’s decision to cut billions of pounds of infrastructure spending to pay for more defence equipment will end up costing the UK 10,000 jobs, according to an analysis of the government’s own figures.

title: Women from minority backgrounds in UK less likely to receive epidurals, research finds
description: Exclusive: Guardian analysis exposes evidence of racial inequalities in pain relief offered across healthcare
content:
Women from black and Asian backgrounds are less likely than their white counterparts to receive an epidural while giving birth, research has revealed.
The findings, based on data collected from more than 2.7 million births in the UK, prompted experts... [6474 chars]

title: Azteca avengers? England return to scene of infamous Maradona handball
description: Mexico have a formidable record in their iconic stadium but for many it will always be associated with one player

title: Sitting for more than 30 minutes at a time linked to higher risk of cancer death
description: Study suggests even light activity such as ironing could reduce health risks linked to prolonged sedentary behaviour
content:
Sitting for longer than half an hour at a time each day raises the risk of dying from cancer, a study suggests.
Researchers who tracked more than 90,000 people over a decade found that sitting or lying down while awake for more than 30 minutes in one... [2899 chars]
